title: Ericoides benthamianum
intro: Ericoides benthamianum, commonly known as Bentham's ericoides, is a flowering plant species within the family Ericaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate respiratory issues and boost the immune system. Bioactive constituents of Ericoides benthamianum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
